form_action.label: Action
form_action.tooltip: Value for form 'action' input (used for ajax)

data.conirm: Warning: Changing action will remove any settings on the Submission tab related to this action!

form_css_id.label: HTML/CSS id
form_css_id.tooltip: Html id attribute used for form (for css styling)

form_class.label: html/css Class
form_class.tooltip: Html class attribute form form (for css styling)

form_bd_class.label: BD Class
form_bd_class.tooltip: Html class attribute for form input wrapper element (for css styling)

form_timeout.label: Timeout (milliseconds)
form_timeout.tooltip: Timeout before reloading a page (if form response indicates a reload)

form_hide_colon.label: Hide Colons
form_hide_colon.tolltip: Shows a colon (:) after field labels

form_hide_star.label: Hide Stars
form_hide_star.tooltip: Shows an asterisk (*) after label for required fields

header1.desc: Advanced options do not need to be set - if having problems with a value, leave it blank

form_target.label: Target
form_target.tooltip: HTML target attribute (used with non-ajax forms, ie. target=_blank to open in new window

form_callback.label: Callback function
form_callback.tooltip: Function to fill in values of the form (default 'get_request_value' fills in from previous submitted values)

form_template_path.label: Template Path
form_template_path.tooltip: Provide a custom path for templates used to create form elements

form_enctype.label: Encoding Type
form_enctype.tooltip: Set form encoding type (using 'enable uploads' sets encoding automatically & overrules this option)

form_nonce_field.label: Nonce Field
form_nonce_field.tooltip: Set a custom key for the wordpress nonce

form_nonce_key.label: Nonce Key
form_nonce_key.tooltip: Value used to generate form nonce

header3.desc: Use this area to add arbitrary data-* attributes to the html form element
